strengths: 8+ years senior-level full-stack experience; current role directly applies AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript, and Node.js—matching the emerging tech focus
Proven ability to architect and maintain production systems at scale (millions of requests, data integration platforms, multiple tech stacks)
Strong engineering discipline with TDD mindset, infrastructure contributions, and demonstrable ability to learn and master new frameworks quickly
concerns: Nest.js framework expertise not documented; while Node.js foundation is solid, framework-specific knowledge gap unclear
React and Vitest/Jest expertise not explicitly listed; primary frontend experience is Ember.js, testing framework depth undocumented despite TDD advocacy
Pattern of 1-2 year tenures across multiple roles may indicate limited focus on long-term system ownership or architectural continuity

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent infrastructure role with TypeScript/Node.js
8+ years senior full-stack experience exceeding 6-year requirement

response.justification: Szabo brings 8+ years of senior-level full-stack experience with a current role perfectly aligned to the job's AI-agent focus and primary TypeScript/Node.js stack. His production-scale background and architectural contributions directly address core requirements. Primary gaps are undocumented expertise in Nest.js and React despite strong Node.js and engineering fundamentals that suggest rapid onboarding. The pattern of shorter tenures warrants discussion about long-term project commitment, though his open-source work and current role suggest sustained technical engagement.
